text:
0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
864 HLTH_LITERACY_CD HLTH_LITERACY_CD B1300 Health Literacy CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how often the resident needs to have someone help them when they read instructions, pamphlets, or other written material from their doctor or pharmacy. 0=Never
1=Rarely
2=Sometimes
3=Often
4=Always
7=Resident declines to respond
8=Resident unable to respond effective 10/01/2023
865 LTTL_INTRST_CD LTTL_INTRST_CD D0150A1 Mood: Little interest/pleasure doing things:
